017package org.apache.juneau.petstore.jetty;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
020import org.apache.juneau.microservice.*;
021import org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.*;
022
023import jakarta.servlet.*;
024
025/**
026 * Petstore Jetty/Microservice deployment entry point.
027 *
028 * <p>
029 * Locates {@code juneau-petstore-jetty.cfg} (in the working directory or on the classpath), wires Jetty via
030 * {@link JettyConfiguration}, and mounts {@link RootResources} as the root servlet.
031 *
032 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
033 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauPetstore">juneau-petstore</a>
034 * </ul>
035 */
036public class App {
037
038   /**
039    * Entry point.
040    *
041    * @param args Command-line arguments forwarded to {@link Microservice}.
042    * @throws Exception If the microservice fails to start.
043    */
044   public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
045      // @formatter:off
046      Microservice
047         .create()
048         .args(args)
049         .configurations(JettyConfiguration.class, AppConfig.class)
050         .build()
051         .start()
052         .startConsole()
053         .join();
054      // @formatter:on
055   }
056
057   /**
058    * Application-specific configuration class contributing the top-level REST servlet.
059    */
060   @Configuration
061   public static class AppConfig {
062
063      /**
064       * Provides the top-level REST servlet, auto-mounted by {@code JettyServerComponent} at
065       * {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.Rest#path()}.
066       *
067       * @return The root servlet.
068       */
069      @Bean
070      public Servlet rootResources() {
071         return new RootResources();
072      }
073   }
074}
